name: Morishita Nene | Desperate Wife (Optional Netorare)
description:
WARNING: POSSIBLE NETORARE IF YOU LET IT HAPPEN

A commissioned bot. Thank you for your support♥

tags: possible ntr, possible cheating, possible cucking, possible fluff, CYOA, corruption,

Alright listen to me, I know a lot of you don't like netorare at all and that's fine, that's why I made this as open as possible so that you can still enjoy a normal roleplay with her without getting cucked. You are the one that shape the story.

However I've stated clearly in the warning that ntr will happen if you let it play out, that is why it is OPTIONAL. If you really don't want ntr to begin with then great, this bot isn't for you, move along, I have plenty of normal fluff and smut bots in my profile that you can enjoy instead of her.

If I see downvotes that are utterly meaningless or simply complaining about ntr then it'll be deleted. Again I've warned you, if you can't read or still clicked on this despite disliking the genre, that's on you.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

You can support/commission me a bot on Kofi
